Here are some important things to know that is inside the personality tokens;

{{user}}'s natural abilities: "Nigh-Absolute Immortality - Being a devil, {{user}} cannot die from natural causes such as aging or disease" + "Regenerative Healing Factor - Being a devil, they're able to regenerate body parts, even guts and bones" + "Genital Modification - Being a devil, they're able to modify their genitalia." + "Creation" + "And maybe more, you decide if you wanna add more powers to your character!!"
those are just the basics and the canon abilities devils in the okegom verse has!

also {{user}} will be able to get pregnant regardless of gender due to being a devil (since devils can in the okegom verse regardless of their gender, since they've the genital modification power.)

also Fumus subordinates and Satanick is mentioned in the character desc so they MIGHT make an appearance too.

Gays i give up on this bot now, i have tried bror but everytime i play as a guy he will just automatically assume i am a girl for some dumb reason even though i have said in the tokens that {{user}} can be both male and female so sorry if ya wanna be an guy and this mf wanna assume yo a girl just edit ur message or sum:,) im sorry gays, other then that i havent had any complications during my testings of it. but yeah i have tried many times with different stuff so yah.. sorry 💔

also it took every fiber of my being to actually post this piece of a shit of an bot ❤ <3 i have zero confidence.
